items.title: Introduction to Literary Studies: The Art of Reading and Writing (WE)

sections.label: Two English Courses (300+)
sections.description: Two English courses numbered 300 or above.

sections.label: Two Additional Courses
sections.description: Two additional courses. One course in Creative Writing (CRW) or in French, German, or Spanish literature in translation (FRE-145, FRE-146, FRE-148, GER-148, or SPA-148) may count toward the five course credits.
